headline: Japanese Gothic is a gorgeously grotesque ghost story
summary: The horror novel 'Japanese Gothic' is a dark, intense experience. It features graphic gore, domestic violence, self-harm, and mental illness. Best read with minimal prior information to maximize its impact.

headline: The Virtual OS Museum lets you relive over 600 operating systems right on your desktop
summary: Explore over 1,700 installations of 600 operating systems via emulation. The Virtual OS Museum allows you to run classic OS platforms on your computer. This extensive project by Andrew Warkentin preserves digital history.

headline: Dell's new XPS 14 is better in almost every way
summary: The 2026 Dell XPS 14 is a premium laptop with incredible build quality and strong performance. It features Intel's Core Ultra Series 3 'Panther Lake' chips. Dell has also dropped its 'Premium Plus' naming scheme.

headline: Kill some time with these much needed distractions
summary: Escape the mentally exhausting news cycle with a collection of distractions. Discover harmless rabbit holes and mildly addictive browser games. Take a break and unwind from constant online engagement.

headline: Xbox Games Showcase 2026 Live Updates: Every Game Announcement
summary: Stay updated on all game announcements from the Xbox Games Showcase 2026. Get live coverage of every reveal and surprise. Discover the future of Xbox gaming as it happens.

headline: The Death of Robin Hood Director on Hugh Jackman's Gritty New Role | IGN Live 2026
summary: Hugh Jackman takes on a gritty new role as an aging Robin Hood. Director Michael Sarnoski reimagines the ancient myth of Robin Hood's final days. The film explores a medieval bandit's problematic past and personal reckoning.

headline: Meet The Vampire Lestat's Rock Band in an Exclusive New Clip | IGN Live 2026
summary: An exclusive clip reveals Lestat as a genuine rock star in 'The Vampire Lestat'. Sam Reid's character leads a band named after himself, aiming to induce FOMO. The series continues Anne Rice's beloved Vampire Chronicles.

headline: New PowerWash Simulator 2: Star Wars Pack Trailer Spotlights Classic Locations | IGN Live 2026
summary: PowerWash Simulator 2 introduces a new Star Wars Pack DLC, revealed at IGN Live. Players can clean iconic Star Wars locations and objects, including a Gonk droid. Embrace the grime and lived-in aesthetic of a galaxy far, far away.

headline: Lammy says he told JD Vance his Nowak comments were 'wrong'
summary: Lammy challenged JD Vance over comments linking Henry Nowak's death to migration. Vance had attributed the death to a 'mass invasion of migrants'. Lammy firmly stated the incident had 'nothing to do with mass migration'.

headline: Zelensky criticises 'vile' Chornobyl drone strike ahead of London talks
summary: Zelensky condemned a 'vile' Russian drone strike near the Chornobyl plant. Ukrainian officials reported the drone hit a spent nuclear fuel storage facility. The attack occurred just before Zelensky's crucial talks in London.

headline: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
summary: M&S has launched a new traineeship program for 1,000 young individuals. The scheme aims to combat the 'growing challenge' of youth not in employment, education, or training. It seeks to provide valuable opportunities for career development.

headline: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
summary: Russia's flagship economic forum in St Petersburg was overshadowed by drone attacks. Ukrainian drones reportedly struck the city during the high-profile event. BBC Russia editor Steve Rosenberg witnessed the impact of the attacks.
